title: One-off reminders: add prompt mode (spawn session like recurring)
description: Add an optional flag to one-off reminders so they can fire as a full prompt (spawning a Claude session with MCP tools) instead of just sending a plain text message. Currently one-off reminders fire by sending text, while recurring reminders spawn a full Claude session. This adds a mode flag so one-off reminders can optionally behave like recurring reminders.
acceptanceCriteria: One-off reminders support a flag/mode that distinguishes 'plain text' from 'prompt' reminders
Plain text reminders continue to work exactly as they do now (send message to group) — this is the default
Prompt-mode reminders spawn a full Claude session when they fire, with MCP config and tool access (similar to recurringReminderExecutor.ts)
The set_reminder MCP tool accepts an optional parameter to set the reminder mode
The reminder scheduler (reminderScheduler.ts) handles both modes — sends text for plain, spawns session for prompt
Database schema updated to store the reminder mode (with migration, backward compatible — existing reminders default to plain text)
Tests cover both modes firing correctly
